titleStmt.title: SII 17.301: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 301. (A.R. No. 273 of 1904). YŌGIMALLAVARAM, PUTTUR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On four detached stones lying in front of the Parāśarēśvara temple.

The inscription is dated in Śaka 991, Saumya and in the 7th year of the king's reign thus yielding the initial year 1063-64 A.D. It describes the king with the Chālukya titles like Sakalabhuvanāśraya, Mēdinīvallabha and Ravikula-tilaka, etc., and also commences with the praśasti Vīramētuṇai-yāgavum, etc., of the king.

This seems to record some grant by the king, when he was seated in his palace on the banks of the river Pagaḷai, in Nuṟuṅgi in Vallakkunda-nāḍu in Vijayarājēndramaṇḍalam to god Pipplādīśvaramuḍaiya-mahādēva.
Four more pieces, apparently belonging to the same inscription seem to record the details of the grant.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . sakalabh[uva]nāṣraiya medini vallava mahārā
jādhirāja parameśvara paramabaṣṭāraka ravikula ti
laka colakulaśekara pāṇḍyakulān=taka Āha
vamallakulakāla Āhavamallaṉai Aimmaṭiveṉ
kaṇṭa rājaśekara rājāśraiya rājarājentravi
racoḷa karikālacoḷa rājakesarivanma śrīmatu
virarājentradevaṟku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu śakātta
m toḷāyirattut toṇṇūṟṟoṉṟu peṟṟa sau
mya samvatsarattu virame tuṇaiyākavum ti
yākame yaṇiyākavuñ ceṅkolo
ccik karuṅkali kaṭintu tennavan(t)talai koṇṭu
ceraṉaicciṟaikoṇṭu ciṅkaṇa tecam Aṭippaṭut
tu veṅkaḷattāhamallanai Aiimaṭi venkaṇ
ṭu veṅkai nāṭu miṭṭu tanṉuṭan piṟan=ta munnavar virata
muṭittu van=taṭipaṇin=ta vijaiyātittaṟku maṇṭalamaru
ḷit taḻalaṭain=ta maṉṉarkkuk kaṭāra meṟintu kuṭuttaru
ḷi śomiśvaranaik kaṉṉaṭatecaṅ kaikeṭat turat
tit tannaṭain=ta caḷukki vikkiramātittanai Eṇṭicai
pukaḻakkaṇṭikai kaṭṭi Iraṭṭa pāṭi Eḻaraiyilakkamu
eṟintu kuṭuttaruḷi vijaiyasiṁhāsanattu Ulaka
muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya cakkarava
ttikaḷ śrīvirarājentradevar vijayarājentramaṇ
ṭalattu vallakkun=ta nāṭu (n)nuṟuṅkiyiṟ pakaḷa
yāṟṟaṅkarai viṭṭaruḷina koyiluḷḷāṟ
paḷḷippiṭatteḻun=taruḷi Iruntu Ātikṣettramāyu
ḷḷa piplātiśvaram Uṭaiya mahaādevaṟku
jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭala

p pāṭṭamum mum vaṇṇā
ṟappāṟaiyum Amutāṭṭuppāṭṭamum Iṭaṅkai
valaṅkai makaḻmaiyum paramaṇṭalaṅkaḷil
Iṟan=ta vīraśeṣaikaḷum taṇṭak kuṟṟamum ve
muḷḷiṭṭa An=tarāyam Epper
tavike Ā lai nakṣatrati
ttomenṟu tiruvāymo
ṭuppukuna tiruvāykkeḻ
koḷkavenṟu variyiliṭṭu
ṇaikkaḷattil mukaveṭṭi ma
m Ivai puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷa
cāḻa muvven=taveḷān Eḻuttinālu
m Ivai puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷanāyakam nirupa cikāmaṇi muv
ven=taveḷān Eḻuttinālum Ivai puravuvaritiṇaik
kaḷanāyakam caḷukkikulakāla muvven=taveḷān Eḻu
ttinālum Ivai puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷanāyakam jayaṅko
ṇṭacoḻat tamanūr nāṭṭu viḻupparaiyan Eḻuttinālu
m rājarājentra muvven=taveḷān Eḻuttinālum virarāje
ntraccoḻa viḻupparaiyar Eḻuttinālp pon=ta Uḷvarippaṭi
virarājentra brahmārāyar viṇṇappattālum vaiykūr
cceri vaikūruṭaiyān mummuṭicoḻamāṇikkanāṉa vira
rājentra malaiyappiccoḻan tiruvāykkeḻviyālu
n rājarāja nāṉa pāṇṭiyarājan AṉaiRead āṇai.Āḷāka
kaṇkāṇi virarājetrappallavara
pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷanāṭṭu Iṭaiyā
ṅkalattu ḷāran Uttamacoḻa
rum Apa rājarājanāṉa vira

hādevar
civapāta ce
pontum I
añcum U
māṭaikkū
koṟkūli
rājātirāja

varkaḷ Eḻu
ṇiyum puravuvari
rai rājentraciṅka
pārviḷākamāna I
ṭayān
Digital edition of SII 17.301 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
